epigraph.quote: We saw the dahlia walk in all its October splendour - it looked just like the postcard.

moments.quote: A kind, wicked N.T. volunteer stole a leaf for me to use as a cutting.

images.caption: The dahlia walk: Biddulph Grange Garden Staffordshire
The Chinese Temple: Biddulph Grange garden.

moments.quote: He bussed to Buxton & then paid £30 for a taxi to Edale.
Half way through supper Thomas tapped on the window. We were very pleased & relieved to see him.
